rulings.Case Title: PAUL SALIBA VS. NAJIB EID SALIBA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Security Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 11, 2017, line 5. CROSS COMPLAINANT HANAN SALIBA, NAJIB EID SALIBA AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE SALIBA's Defendants Motion For Security Undertaking Hearing Required. By no later than 9:00 a.m. on January 11, 2017 Plaintiff shall file and serve a declaration providing proof of California residency. Evidence shall include, but is not limited to: (1) copy of executed lease referenced in December 12, 2016 declaration; (2) copy of Driver's License and/ or application for California Driver's License showing the date of such application; (3) Voter Registration; (4) USPS mail forwarding request (showing the date it was made); (5) utilities application and bills; and (6) bank statements (redacted) showing date and address. = (501/REQ)
